data.title: Singular Genomics Names the Spatial Technologies Unit at Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center a G4X™ Center of Excellence
data.description: Singular Genomics revealed today that the Spatial Technologies Unit (STU) at Beth Israel Deaconess has been designated as the initial G4X Early Access Program site, aiming to enhance the global adoption of G4X. This move emphasizes the unit's pivotal role in pioneering the G4X program. The announcement was made in both San Diego and Boston on March 12, 2026.

data.title: Iran Conflict Underscores Need to Build Iron Ore Pellet Plant Capacity in North America
data.description: In Montreal on March 12, 2026, Strategic Resources Inc. (TSXV: SR) addressed the effects of the ongoing conflict in Iran and the Persian Gulf on the worldwide iron ore pellet sector. Emphasizing the urgency to hasten the production of pellets, the company highlighted the importance of swift action in response to the current situation.

data.title: KMS Lighthouse Recognized As a Leader in KMWorld's "100 Companies That Matter in Knowledge Management 2026"
data.description: A company based in Dallas, KMS Lighthouse, known for its AI-driven enterprise knowledge management solutions, has revealed that it was chosen to be part of the KMWorld 100 Companies That Matter in Knowledge Management 2026 list. This selection marks the company's continued presence on the prestigious list, showcasing its leadership in the industry.

data.title: Aave (AAVE) price target set at $131-137 by mid-March 2026. Current price $110.90, with RSI at 44.63. MACD signals caution.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Aave (AAVE) is currently trading at $110.90, drawing attention from analysts who anticipate a potential breakout in the range of $131 to $137. While the Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral 44.63, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator indicates a bearish momentum, signaling a need for caution among investors.

data.title: Ohana Dental Announces New Website for Its Kahala, Kahului, and Waipahu Locations
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Ohana Dental revealed the debut of its updated website, https://www.ohanadentalhawaii.com. The revamped site emphasizes the practice's dedication to enhancing patient experience, integrating modern technology, and providing easily accessible information to individuals throughout Hawaii.

data.title: Phemex TradFi Hits $10B Monthly Volume, Advancing Cross-Market Trading Infrastructure
data.description: In APIA, Samoa, on March 12, 2026, Phemex, a crypto exchange focusing on user experience, revealed that their TradFi trading platform has reached over $10 billion in trading volume within its inaugural month. This achievement was propelled by a surge in interest for tokenized gold and commodity contracts, illustrating a growing demand for such assets in the market.

data.title: Fraud victims in China contest UK's plan for 61,000 seized Bitcoin, fearing loss of gains, appeal to High Court.
data.description: Investors from China who were victims of fraud in the Zhimin Qian case are appealing to the UK High Court to oppose a proposal concerning the 61,000 Bitcoin that had been seized. They argue that accepting the plan could lead to them losing out on potential growth in the value of the assets.

data.title: Sunrise Realty Trust, Inc. Announces Financial Results for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported a GAAP net income of $1.6 million, equivalent to $0.12 per basic weighted average common share. Additionally, Distributable Earnings totaled $3.5 million, or $0.27 per basic weighted average common share.
